language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings

mal.title: Connect MyAnimeList
mal.subtitle: Sync your anime list (you can do this later)

tracking.title: Player Tracking Setup
tracking.instructions:
1. Open your player and start an anime (do not pause).
2. The list updates every 5 seconds.
tracking.blocked_hint: Please select at least one application to track
